hooks.text: You sent the full amount. Your supplier got 200 dollars less. You did not get scammed and your supplier is not lying to you.
Your supplier just asked you to top up 200 dollars they never received. The money did not vanish. Someone in the middle took it.
Up to 15 percent of wires to China land short. On a 50,000 dollar payment, hidden banks in the middle can quietly eat 30 to 150 dollars.
A business owner sent 50,000 dollars to his factory. Days later the supplier messaged: short 165, please send the rest. He had paid in full.
Every wire you send on the default setting lets unknown banks shave money off in transit. You pay it twice and never see where it went.
